risk_model.surge_rsi_rule: known daily RSI(14) must be <= 40; missing RSI is shadow-tracked
notes: Display-only research plan. It does not place orders.
Designed for tiny surge participation: defined risk, fast first take, runner only after TP1.
LATE_FIRE_WATCH means the alert likely arrived after the useful first move.

trade_plan.trigger: Tiny starter only if price reclaims/holds the fire area; no add-down, no second buy without a new setup.
